title: Iron Dome Per-Repo Override
description: Schema for .iron-dome.yml — per-repo overrides layered on iron-dome.yml. PBI #427.

disabled_patterns.description: Secret pattern NAMES to disable for this repo (must match a name in critical_patterns, e.g. Generic API Key).

additional_patterns.description: Extra named secret patterns to add for this repo, on top of the defaults.
